title: Legends of 1.7
description: A nostalgic 1.7.10 modpack with magic, dungeons, farming, and performance tweaks.
body:
![titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e81047a23609225fa22a5256b6f3dbab8905a61_0.webp)

---

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)

---

Experience Minecraft 1.7.10 with the most iconic and beloved mods of its time, carefully optimized for modern systems.

---

**📷 Media**

![Cusrom Bioms and the old textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/imKZw7PD/images/cb9656162c015955f8bb2cd7e1d8af4bd4c625e3.png)

---

<details>
<summary>🧱 What's Included?</summary>

**🔧 Core & Performance**  

**🛠️ Classic Tech & Industry**  

**✨ Magic & Exploration**  

**🌱 Farming & Progression** 

**🧭 Quality of Life**  

</details>

<details>
<summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>

This modpack is perfect for players who:

• Love the golden age of modded Minecraft  
• Want the most popular and iconic mods from Minecraft 1.7.10  
• Enjoy tech, magic, exploration, and long-term progression  
• Prefer a balanced, well-curated pack over an overloaded one  
• Want good performance without losing depth  

Whether you're automating factories, mastering magic, or exploring a dangerous world — Legends of 1.7 delivers a true classic modded experience.

</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Notes</summary>

• Built specifically for Minecraft 1.7.10  
• Focused on compatibility, balance, and stability  
• Designed to feel nostalgic while remaining smooth on modern systems  

</details>
